title: The Materials Select Sector SPDR Premium Income Fund declares $0.6102 dividend
content:
* The Materials Select Sector SPDR Premium Income Fund (XLBI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XLBI]) declares $0.6102/share monthly dividend [https://www.ssga.com/us/en/intermediary/resources/documents/etf-dividend-distributions].
 	* 30-Day SEC Yield of 1.67% as of Dec. 24.
 	* Payable Dec. 31; for shareholders of record Dec. 29; ex-div Dec. 29.
 	* See XLBI Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XLBI/dividends?source=news_bullet]

MORE ON THE MATERIALS SELECT SECTOR SPDR PREMIUM INCOME FUND
